title: Collection by distraint and sale authorized
doc_html:
§1569.  Collection by distraint and sale authorized

When any taxpayer fails to pay any tax, penalty and interest assessed, as provided in this Sub-title, the collector may proceed to enforce the collection thereof by distraint and sale.
doc_text:
§1569.  Collection by distraint and sale authorized
When any taxpayer fails to pay any tax, penalty and interest assessed, as provided in this Sub-title, the collector may proceed to enforce the collection thereof by distraint and sale.
